channel.title: doyouknow.app - English
channel.description: Surprising facts about UAE, Saudi Arabia, and the world.

item.title: Things To Do in Dubai: A Year-Round Weekly Guide
item.description: Discover the best things to do in Dubai any week of the year. From brunches and beach clubs to concerts, markets, and free activities — a sustainable year-round guide.

item.title: Arabic Facebook Ads Guide: Target Arab Professionals
item.description: Master Facebook ads for Arab professionals. Learn audience targeting, Arabic copywriting, cultural best practices, budget optimization, and case studies.

item.title: Cold Email Mastery: Guide for Startup Marketing Managers
item.description: Master cold emailing startup marketing managers with proven strategies, subject lines, templates, follow-up sequences, tools, and GDPR compliance tips for 2025.

item.title: Diriyah: The Birthplace of Saudi Arabia
item.description: Discover Diriyah, the ancestral home of the Saudi state, its 1744 alliance, UNESCO-listed At-Turaif, and its transformation under Vision 2030.

item.title: The Red Sea Project: Saudi Luxury Tourism
item.description: The Red Sea Project is reshaping luxury tourism in Saudi Arabia. Explore its islands, resorts, sustainability goals, and what visitors can expect.

item.title: Saudi AI Market Entry Guide: Vision 2030 & SDAIA
item.description: Complete guide to entering the Saudi AI market: SDAIA, licensing, data sovereignty, Arabic NLP, Vision 2030 alignment, and partnership strategies for tech firms.

item.title: How to Start a Business in Dubai
item.description: A practical, step-by-step guide to starting a business in Dubai. Real costs, timelines, and specific steps for entrepreneurs and founders.

item.title: THE LINE: What We Know About NEOM's Linear City
item.description: THE LINE is NEOM's planned 170-kilometer linear city in Saudi Arabia. Learn about its design, technology, current progress, and the debate around it.

item.title: UAE Corporate Tax: What You Need to Know
item.description: A practical explainer on UAE corporate tax for business owners. Understand rates, exemptions, compliance requirements, and what changed in 2023–2025.

item.title: UAE Golden Visa Guide
item.description: Understand the UAE Golden Visa routes, broad eligibility categories, application steps, and the official sources to check before you apply.

item.title: Best Time to Visit Dubai: A Complete Seasonal Guide
item.description: Plan your Dubai trip with our seasonal guide. Discover the best months to visit, weather by season, peak vs off-season deals, Ramadan tips, and top events.

item.title: NEOM City: Saudi Arabia's Futuristic City Guide
item.description: A guide to NEOM, Saudi Arabia's futuristic city. Explore THE LINE, Oxagon, Trojena, and Sindalah.

item.title: Saudi Desert Camping: Best Locations, Gear & Safety
item.description: Complete guide to desert camping in Saudi Arabia: top locations, gear, safety tips, permits, seasons, stargazing, Bedouin culture, and glamping.

item.title: Saudi Vision 2030: Guide to the Kingdom's Transformation
item.description: A complete guide to Saudi Vision 2030: its three pillars, megaprojects including NEOM and the Red Sea Project, economic diversification, social reforms, and progress metrics.

item.title: Arab Teams World Cup 2026: Squad Guide
item.description: Guide to all Arab teams at World Cup 2026: Morocco, Saudi Arabia, Tunisia, Algeria, Egypt, Qatar, Iraq, and Jordan. Profiles, squads, and schedules.

item.title: Saudi Arabia Travel Guide 2026
item.description: Complete Saudi Arabia travel guide 2026: visas, best times to visit, all regions from Riyadh to AlUla, transport options, cultural tips, and essential planning advice.

item.title: Riyadh Nightlife Guide 2026
item.description: Riyadh nightlife has transformed dramatically since Saudi Arabia’s social reforms. Discover the best cafes, restaurants, entertainment venues and what to expect in 2026.

item.title: Saudi Cuisine Guide: Dishes & Food
item.description: Explore Saudi Arabian cuisine: traditional dishes, regional specialties from Najd to Hijaz, and the best places to eat authentic Saudi food in 2026.

item.title: Abu Dhabi Travel Guide: Top Attractions & Hotels
item.description: Complete Abu Dhabi travel guide 2025: Louvre, Sheikh Zayed Mosque, Yas Island, Corniche, Emirates Palace, Qasr Al Watan, hotels, restaurants, transport & day trips.

item.title: Algeria's Attack at World Cup 2026
item.description: Algeria's attack is one of the most exciting discussions in Arab football because it sits right at the intersection of flair and risk. At World Cup 2…
